cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation policy
cancellationPolicy.advance: Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours in advance of your reservation time.
cancellationPolicy.confirmation: Upon booking, we will send you a confirmation email to confirm whether we can arrange the service for you and in case fully booked, we will inform you the closest time available.
cancellationPolicy.urgent: If you need to make change or make urgent booking please contact out hotline: +84 976 591 515 or email senspa.dn@gmail.com
cancellationPolicy.arrive: We suggest you to arrive at our spa 10 minutes earlier to relax before the treatment time.
